refreshPolicy: Cron checks every 30 minutes and writes only inside ESPN kickoff windows: 90m pre-match through 3h post-match; manual force bypasses the gate.
statsSource: FOX Sports player boards + xGscore team advanced stats

stats.source: FOX Sports player/stat tables + xGscore team advanced stats + FIFA/ESPN schedule/results

categories.title: Player xG
categories.note: Who is getting the best looks, not just who finished.

categories.title: Player rating
categories.note: One-number form signal; useful but not gospel.

categories.title: Team xG
categories.note: xGscore team expected goals; stronger advanced substrate than FOX aggregate table.

categories.title: Team xG conceded
categories.note: Chance quality allowed. Lower is better.

categories.title: Team xG on target
categories.note: Shot quality after placement: keeper-test danger.

categories.title: Finishing delta
categories.note: Goals minus xG: hot finishing or cold finishing.
